name: PsyopAnime
description: PsyopAnime aims to be the first token backed by Pumpfun's creator revenue model aimed at creating a sustainable and fruitful relationship between community, art & animation. Connected through the ai anime inventive and creative ideology from the collective of the PsyopAnime studio, the project features WW3 ai anime news that has garnered massive attention. Royalties and admin ownership were given to the artist and he has since taken full ownership of the coin to his name and branding to push the next level of web 3 forward.
